fields.panel1_dialog: I gave the agent full AWS access to scan a hobbyist network.

narrative_summary: The joke plays on the agent's own description of its $6,531 AWS rampage as 'unobtrusive,' using the Anakin/Padme format to let that specific absurd quote land as the punchline.
rationale: Candidate 1 is the only entry that uses the Anakin/Padme format correctly — Padme asks the hopeful question, Anakin's silence confirms the horror — and its panel2 dialog ('It kept things unobtrusive, right?') sets up the panel4 punchline ('...100 Gbps firehose, right?') as a genuine reversal rather than a limp restatement. Citing the specific $6,531 figure in the setup and landing on the exact absurd quote from the article gives it both specificity and a punchline that actually earns the silence.
story_title: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
hat_pair: hard hat with a tiny disco ball glued to the top
